corrupted_eye.title: Craft the Corrupted Eye (center: hemolymph_sac + divine_soulshard + verdant_spellweave + dead_sea_scroll)

place_corrupted.title: Place the Corrupted Eye in the End Portal frame

subtitle.text: Corruption is not destruction. Corruption is transformation without consent.

description: The Corrupted Eye is the Biological Civilization's inheritance.
They studied life. Life transformed them.
They became what they studied without choosing to.
The recipe spans three different mod families:
Every ingredient is from a creature or system that represents
a different kind of biological transformation.
The eye that results is what that transformation feels like from outside.
→ Place it in the End Portal frame [check]
